title: What Claude Can Do For You
subtitle: Claude for Beginners — Like One Academy

sections.text: Meet Claude. Not a search engine. Not a chatbot. Claude is an AI assistant that understands context, follows complex instructions, and generates thoughtful, nuanced responses. In this lesson, you will discover exactly what Claude can do for you.

Claude can write. Emails, reports, blog posts, marketing copy, even poetry. But it does not just fill a template — it adapts to your voice, your audience, your goals. Tell it your tone and context, and it writes like it knows you.
Claude can analyze. Drop in a spreadsheet, a contract, a research paper. Ask questions. Get summaries, comparisons, insights. Claude reads faster than any human and catches patterns you might miss.

Claude can code. JavaScript, Python, SQL, whatever you need. It explains what it writes, debugs your errors, and teaches you along the way. You do not need to be a developer to use Claude for technical work.

And here is the most powerful part — Claude can search the web, access real-time information, and work with your documents. It is not stuck in the past. It can look things up, verify facts, and bring you current data.

The key to getting great results from Claude is understanding one thing — Claude works best when you give it context. The more it knows about what you need, the better it performs. This is what separates a basic prompt from a powerful one.
